Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Public Administrator's Office, Administrator.

The court begins by asking if there are any known objections. Ms. Mannion reports that she does not know of any objections and no objections are presented in open court. The court then advises that it will be waiving any remaining issues.

The Petition to Determine, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannioin for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that Ms. Mannion was until recently employed by the Court, that he does not feel her past employment requires his recusal of this matter, and that it does not affect his ability to be fair and impartial. Ms. Mannion addressed the issue of venue making reference to Probate Code 7051 and the meaning of the word domicile, spoke of the connection Mr. Lansmere had to San Francisco, stated that the Conservatee was sent to Saint Francis Hospital, and that somehow St. Francis got Mr. Lansmere to sign documents and discharged him to the Marinol Care Facility. Ms. Mannion also stated that Mr. Lansmere lived in San Francisco since the 70's, that he worked at Macy's on O'Farrell Street, that he expressed that he was unhappy with his placement at Marinol and that he wanted to return to San Francisco. In addition, Ms. Mannion stated that her office was involved with Mr. Lansmere since 2017, that the Decedent had one account in the UK and one in the Isle of Mann, and that her office has the paper work and is in a good position to get the ball rolling. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of the estate is set for August 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
